Subject: RE: Discovery Responses
Message:
Joe,

If you would be so kind as to bring your address book and/or a list of
family and friends, including addresses and phone numbers, of those who have
knowledge of this situation, especially your mom and sister and anyone who
had firsthand knowledge (not just things you've told them, but things they
knew or experienced) of the issues in this case.  For instance, a coworker
might know things you've told while all this has been going on, but a common
friend or neighbor would have more significant knowledge.

Also, if you would go through the Interrogatories and take a stab at
answering the questions that you have answers to, it will save you a lot of
attorney fee time.
